title: pilosella albulana
intro: Pilosella albulana is a rare, endangered species of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is native to the Pyrenees mountains and has been used in traditional medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. Pilosella albulana is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, with some herbalists also using it in salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
